name: AI短视频制作全流程
who_for: 社交媒体运营、内容创作者
description: 从脚本撰写到视频生成、配音、字幕，一站式AI短视频制作流程
description_en: End-to-end AI short video production from script to subtitles

steps.title: 撰写视频脚本
steps.description: 使用AI写作工具生成短视频脚本
steps.description_en: Use AI writing tools to generate short video scripts

steps.title: 生成视频素材
steps.description: 将脚本转换为视频，自动匹配素材
steps.description_en: Convert script to video with auto B-roll matching

steps.title: 添加AI配音
steps.description: 使用AI语音生成自然配音
steps.description_en: Generate natural voiceover with AI

steps.title: 自动添加字幕
steps.description: AI自动识别语音并添加多语言字幕
steps.description_en: AI automatically recognizes speech and adds multilingual subtitles

steps.title: 剪辑与发布
steps.description: 快速剪辑并发布到社交媒体
steps.description_en: Quick edit and publish to social media

name: AI博客文章从构思到发布
name_en: AI Blog Post from Concept to Publication
who_for: 内容营销人员、博客作者
description: 从主题研究、大纲生成、文章撰写、SEO优化到配图，完整的AI博客创作流程
description_en: Complete AI blog creation from research to SEO-optimized publication

steps.title: 主题研究与关键词
steps.description: 使用AI研究热门话题和关键词
steps.description_en: Research trending topics and keywords with AI

steps.title: 生成文章大纲
steps.description: AI根据关键词生成结构化大纲
steps.description_en: AI generates structured outline from keywords

steps.title: 撰写正文
steps.description: 使用AI写作工具逐段生成内容
steps.description_en: Generate content section by section with AI writing tools

steps.title: 生成配图
steps.description: AI生成博客配图和社交媒体封面
steps.description_en: AI generates featured images and social covers

steps.title: SEO优化与发布
steps.description: AI检查SEO要素并给出优化建议
steps.description_en: AI checks SEO elements and provides optimization suggestions

name: AI产品摄影与电商图
description: 无需专业摄影设备，用AI生成高质量产品图、场景图和电商素材
description_en: Generate high-quality product photos without professional equipment

steps.title: 产品抠图
steps.description: AI自动去除产品背景
steps.description_en: AI automatically removes product background

steps.title: 生成场景图
steps.description: AI生成产品使用场景和生活方式图片
steps.description_en: AI generates usage scenarios and lifestyle images

steps.title: 优化与增强
steps.description: AI增强图片质量和色彩
steps.description_en: AI enhances image quality and colors

steps.title: 批量生成变体
steps.description: 生成多角度、多背景的产品图
steps.description_en: Generate multi-angle, multi-background product images

name: AI有声书制作
who_for: 作家、内容创作者、出版商
description: 从文稿到专业级有声书，全流程AI语音制作
description_en: Full AI voice production from manuscript to professional audiobook

steps.title: 文稿预处理
steps.description: 使用AI整理文稿格式和结构
steps.description_en: Use AI to organize manuscript format and structure

steps.title: 选择声音角色
steps.description: 为不同角色选择合适的AI声音
steps.description_en: Select appropriate AI voices for different characters

steps.title: 生成语音
steps.description: AI批量生成章节语音
steps.description_en: AI batch generates chapter voiceovers

steps.title: 添加背景音乐
steps.description: AI生成或选择合适的背景音乐
steps.description_en: AI generates or selects appropriate background music

steps.title: 混音与导出
steps.description: AI自动混音并导出为有声书格式
steps.description_en: AI auto-mixes and exports in audiobook format

name: AI代码开发与自动化审查
who_for: 软件开发人员、技术团队
description: 从代码编写、自动补全、测试生成到安全审计的AI辅助开发全流程
description_en: AI-assisted development from coding to security audit

steps.title: AI代码补全
steps.description: 使用AI助手进行实时代码补全
steps.description_en: Use AI assistants for real-time code completion

steps.title: 自动生成测试
steps.description: AI根据代码自动生成单元测试
steps.description_en: AI auto-generates unit tests from code

steps.title: 代码审查
steps.description: AI自动审查代码质量和安全问题
steps.description_en: AI automatically reviews code quality and security

steps.title: 生成文档
steps.description: AI自动生成API文档和代码注释
steps.description_en: AI auto-generates API docs and code comments

name: AI社交媒体运营
who_for: 社交媒体经理、品牌营销人员
description: 从内容规划、文案撰写、配图生成到排期发布的完整社交媒体工作流
description_en: Complete social media workflow from content planning to scheduling

steps.title: 内容日历规划
steps.description: AI根据趋势规划一周内容
steps.description_en: AI plans weekly content based on trends

steps.title: 撰写社交媒体文案
steps.description: AI生成各平台适配的文案
steps.description_en: AI generates platform-optimized copy

steps.title: 生成配图
steps.description: AI生成社交媒体配图和视频缩略图

steps.title: 排期发布
steps.description: AI选择最佳发布时间并自动排期
steps.description_en: AI selects optimal posting times and auto-schedules

steps.title: 数据分析
steps.description: AI分析帖子表现并给出优化建议
steps.description_en: AI analyzes post performance and provides optimization suggestions

name: AI在线课程制作
who_for: 教育工作者、培训师、知识博主
description: 从课程大纲、视频录制、配音、字幕到平台发布的完整课程制作流程
description_en: Complete course production from outline to platform publishing

steps.title: 课程大纲设计
steps.description: AI辅助设计课程结构和章节
steps.description_en: AI assists in designing course structure and chapters

steps.title: 生成教学内容
steps.description: 将教学内容转为视频或AI讲师视频
steps.description_en: Convert teaching content to video or AI instructor video

steps.title: 屏幕录制与演示
steps.description: 录制操作演示并自动标注
steps.description_en: Record operation demos with auto annotations

steps.title: 添加多语言字幕
steps.description: AI自动识别并添加多语言字幕
steps.description_en: AI auto-recognizes and adds multilingual subtitles

steps.title: 课程测验生成
steps.description: AI根据课程内容自动生成测验题
steps.description_en: AI auto-generates quiz questions from course content

name: AI销售邮件自动化
who_for: 销售人员、业务开发经理
description: 从客户研究、个性化邮件撰写、A/B测试到自动跟进的销售邮件工作流
description_en: Sales email workflow from research to automated follow-ups

steps.title: 客户画像研究
steps.description: AI分析目标客户和行业背景
steps.description_en: AI analyzes target customers and industry context

steps.title: 个性化邮件撰写
steps.description: AI生成针对每个客户的个性化邮件
steps.description_en: AI generates personalized emails for each customer

steps.title: A/B测试
steps.description: AI自动测试不同主题行和内容
steps.description_en: AI auto-tests different subject lines and content

steps.title: 自动跟进
steps.description: AI根据回复情况自动发送跟进邮件
steps.description_en: AI auto-sends follow-up emails based on responses

name: AI播客制作
who_for: 播客主持人、内容创作者
description: 从选题策划、脚本撰写、录音、剪辑到发布的完整播客制作流程
description_en: Complete podcast production from topic selection to publishing

steps.title: 选题策划
steps.description: AI研究热门话题并生成节目大纲
steps.description_en: AI researches trending topics and generates show outline

steps.title: 脚本撰写
steps.description: AI辅助撰写播客脚本和提示词
steps.description_en: AI assists in writing podcast scripts and cues

steps.title: 录音与降噪
steps.description: AI自动降噪和音频增强
steps.description_en: AI auto noise reduction and audio enhancement

steps.title: 剪辑与配乐
steps.description: AI剪辑音频并添加背景音乐
steps.description_en: AI edits audio and adds background music

steps.title: 转写与发布
steps.description: AI生成文字稿并发布到各平台
steps.description_en: AI generates transcripts and publishes to platforms

name: AI周报与工作汇报
who_for: 项目经理、团队负责人、自由职业者
description: 自动收集工作数据、生成分析报告、撰写专业周报的完整流程
description_en: Automated data collection, analysis report generation, and professional weekly report writing

steps.title: 数据汇总
steps.description: AI从各平台自动收集工作数据
steps.description_en: AI auto-collects work data from various platforms

steps.title: 数据分析
steps.description: AI分析本周完成的工作和进度
steps.description_en: AI analyzes completed work and progress

steps.title: 撰写周报
steps.description: AI根据数据自动生成专业周报
steps.description_en: AI auto-generates professional weekly report from data

steps.title: 下周计划
steps.description: AI辅助制定下周工作计划
steps.description_en: AI assists in creating next week's work plan
